verification_gate: The task family covers capacity, scheduling, isolation, transport, offline behavior, observability, failure containment, authority, rollback, and deterministic proof.

capacity.value: ruvllm fixed at one frozen foundation model serving 50+ agents on a single hardware footprint (A); per-node VRAM/compute budgets bound the mesh (C); latency-tiered storage capacity redb-microseconds vs PostgreSQL-milliseconds (I).

scheduling.value: RuvLTRA Proportional Intelligence routes reflex tasks to local ruvllm and escalates architectural tasks to cloud tiers (A); Ruflo orchestrates ensemble/routing across mesh nodes without owning canonical state (C).

isolation.value: Per-.rvf training isolation, non-authoritative (B); MinCut subpolynomial deterministic severing + COW staging-branch isolation (D); delegated-and-revocable authority boundary isolating subordinates from the control plane (H).

transport.value: UDS + shared memory-mapped redb + MessagePack zero-copy, weave bus primitives with 15s/30s/60s heartbeat (E); redb-WAL transport path during PostgreSQL outage (F); read-only redb-over-UDS observability transport (G). No HTTP/REST.

offline_behavior.value: redb acts as an ACID application-level WAL when PostgreSQL is offline/latent; edge node stays functional; forward-only reconciliation via envctl on reconnect; no durable macro-state authored offline.

observability.value: LifeOS Mission Control reads the same memory-mapped redb file agents write (zero overlapping state); ATAS forecasts resource burn / complexity spikes / failure nodes; db_health surfaces storage-tier status (G); weave presence/heartbeat telemetry (E).

failure_containment.value: MinCut isolates a drifting node without swarm restart (C, D); failed COW branches discarded not merged (D); nothing simulated/learned/offline promoted to baseline without a proof gate, failed worlds discarded (J).

authority.value: ruvllm is a hosted console with no routing policy (A); .rvf training non-authoritative for shared state (B); mesh/Ruflo own only transient routing metadata (C); PostgreSQL is the single durable writer and network-control policy holder, all subordinates delegated/revocable (H, I). Directly enforces 'without independent control-plane ownership.'

rollback.value: COW discards failed branches cleanly (D); discarded offline redb buffer is rollback by definition (F); un-green blobstore parity run is the cutover rollback boundary (I); task-level rollback = restore archived intelligence plan, compute and network state unchanged (J, matching INTEL-002 rollback_plan column).

deterministic_proof.value: SHAKE256 Cryptographic Witness Chains root every learned claim in a PostgreSQL source vector (B, J); BlobStore SHA-256 content-addressed parity proves storage cutover (I); ESN-verified COW commit is the deterministic timeline-selection proof (J). System never asks models to redo work.

governing_constraint_no_independent_cont.value: INTEL-002-H makes the boundary explicit: no compute/mesh/network component owns an independent control plane; every subordinate authority is delegated and revocable; single durable writer is PostgreSQL. A, B, C, and I each restate their subordinate, non-authoritative role.

proof_summary: INTEL-002 defines the local intelligence compute and mesh substrate as a task family of 10 governed work items (INTEL-002-A through -J) that collectively cover every one of the 10 gate dimensions and every one of the 7 capability domains named in the goal, all subordinate to the LifeOS authority substrate with no independent control-plane ownership. Local inference is bound to ruvllm as a hosted console (one frozen foundation model, 50+ agents, RuvLTRA scheduling) with no routing authority of its own (A); local training is per-agent AgentDB (.rvf) SONA/RL, non-authoritative and witnessed by SHAKE256 chains rooted in PostgreSQL source vectors (B); distributed compute is a mesh of ruvllm+redb peers coordinated by Ruflo, which owns only transient routing metadata (C); isolation and failure containment come from MinCut's subpolynomial O(n^{o(1)}) deterministic severing plus COW staging branches that discard failed timelines (D); transport is UDS + shared memory-mapped redb + MessagePack + the weave bus, never HTTP/REST (E); offline behavior is redb-as-application-level-WAL with forward-only envctl reconciliation and no offline durable authorship (F); observability is a read-only projection over the same redb files agents write plus ATAS forecasts and db_health (G); the network-control and authority boundary (H) is the explicit enforcement of 'serve LifeOS without independent control-plane ownership' — PostgreSQL is the single durable writer and network-policy holder and every subordinate is delegated and revocable; compute-tier storage inherits STORE-001 verbatim (redb transient, PostgreSQL canonical, forward-only envctl sync, verified BlobStore SHA-256 parity cutover) and introduces no new durable authority (I); and deterministic proof plus rollback discipline (J) require SHAKE256 witness chains, BlobStore parity, or ESN-verified COW commits before any state counts, with task rollback = restoring the archived intelligence plan while compute and network state remain unchanged. The gate holds: each of capacity, scheduling, isolation, transport, offline behavior, observability, failure containment, authority, rollback, and deterministic proof maps to at least one work item; every work item carries an owner and a decision; and every assignment traces to the Architecture Blueprint, the Architecture Context Matrix, STORE-001, or the WEAVE-001 evidence. This is a planning artifact only — no GPU workload, network mutation, model download, or peer implementation was performed.
grounding_sources: 1.0_VISION/Notebooklm/Architecture Blueprint - LifeOS Core Foundation.md (§1 No-Sidecar/tiered memory, §2 AgentDB RL, §3 ruvllm edge inference, §4 Ruflo/RuvLTRA/ATAS, §5 COW branching, §6 MinCut/Witness Chains, UDS section)

rollback_plan: Restore the archived intelligence plan; compute and network state remain unchanged.
